flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Forsyth Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Forsyth Technical Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (59.7% → 73.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Forsyth Technical Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5k → 7.1k).
